title: rubus canduliger
intro: Rubus canduliger, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, sore throats, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Rubus canduliger include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help protect against chronic diseases like heart disease and cancer. Rubus canduliger can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder for herbal use, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
